Video.summary: Team kicks off a new resto-mod project with a rare, but rusted Mopar.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: '70 Challenger

Video.summary: Team salvages rotted out '70 Challenger with how-to weld in a new metal roof, drip rails and A-pillars.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Roof Skin

Video.summary: Chassis guru Jeff Schwartz brings in his G-Machine chassis to convert uni-body Challenger to a full frame.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Framed

Video.summary: Final Mopar sheet metal tech - how to weld in a new trunk pan and fabricate a front cowl panel from scratch.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Body Beautiful

Video.summary: Team grafts world's first low deck, all aluminum Hemi and T56 six speed gearbox into '70 Challenger resto-mod.
Video.title: Crazy Hemi

Video.summary: Team fabs high flow EFI fuel system, serpentine belt drive and dual fan cooling system for '70 Hemi Challenger
Video.title: Mopar Makeovers

Video.summary: Project Ultraviolet, the 1970 Challenger Pro Touring ride takes its maiden voyage
Video.title: Ultraviolet Payoff

Video.summary: This project will result in a diesel rig by combining both old and new, Dodge chassis and Ford cab.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 1

Video.summary: We'll straighten out our 1997 Dodge frame before setting our 1979 Ford F-350 body on it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Video.summary: We're modifying our 1997 Dodge frame before bolting our 1979 F-350 body to it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Video.summary: Super Dually gets a coating of sound insulation and spray-on bed liner.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Video.summary: Project: SuperDually gets new a new steering shaft, headlights and under hood paint.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 8

Video.summary: Is the C5 Corvette Z06 the ultimate bang for your buck track and street car, or is there room for improvement?
Video.title: C5 Z06 Bolt on Power

Video.summary: Adding more Stop and Go to our C5 Corvette Z06 for the track.
Video.title: Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06

Image.alt: Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06
Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06
Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06

Video.summary: Detroit Muscle Undertakes a mission to squeeze everything that they can out of a tired Iroc Z.
Video.title: Iroc and So Can You!

Video.summary: The guys squeeze their budget and also do some free fixes to freshen up the budget Iroc’s interior.
Video.title: Low Buck Iroc Interior

Video.summary: Take a look at how SEMA cars are built just a couple of weeks out from the big show
Video.title: SEMA Mustang Thrash

Video.summary: Learn a low-buck way to rescue faded, nasty paint. Also, the budget IROC goes for a drive.
Video.title: IROC Paint Overhaul and Payoff

Video.summary: The guys begin a tribute build to one of the most legendary muscle cars ever made: a 1969 ZL1 COPO Camaro.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO

Video.summary: An all-aluminum ZL1 Big Block gets plugged into the '69 COPO Camaro tribute.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Image.alt: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Video.summary: Work continues on the COPO Camaro tribute project as the guys get to work building a new suspension system.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Suspension

Video.summary: The guys plug in their revamped front and rear, then modify the car to accept manual floor pedals.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Gains its Feet

Video.summary: Learn how you can improve on the classic Muncie 4-Speed with modern technology.
Video.title: COPO Camaro 4-Speed Build

Video.summary: The MuscleCar guys work on getting the interior into the 1969 COPO Camaro Tribute project.
Video.title: COPO Interior and Exhaust

Video.summary: We finalize the COPO Camaro by doing a quick rundown on firing a crate motor for the first time.
Video.title: COPO to Go!

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew rescues a familiar green 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Driveway Rescue - 1971 Chevy Caprice

Video.summary: We kick off a new project, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, by searching through a big-body boneyard.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 1

Video.summary: We mock, swap, and drop in a new transmission to handle all the power we’re adding to our Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 2

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel visit the powder room to freshen up the frame on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 3

Video.summary: We make repairs on Fat Stack, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, showing you how to remove rust and pull dents.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 4

Video.summary: A fresh coat of paint helps transform our Chevy Caprice into a not-so-lean, mean, green machine!
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 5

Video.summary: A marriage made in heaven – Our Fat Stack Caprice gets reunited with our updated chassis.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 6

Video.summary: Chrome is where the heart is – Tommy and Joel update the bright work on their ‘71 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 7

Video.summary: We begin to piece our ‘71 Caprice Fat Stack back together, installing glass, hood, and body panels.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 8

Video.summary: We install the cooling system on our ’71 Caprice and then put the pedal to the metal.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 9

Video.summary: We restore the heater box on Fat Stack, and install air conditioning components to make it cool.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Image.alt: Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion
Project Fat Stack– Part 10 A/C Conversion

Video.summary: The guys finalize Fat Stack’s transformation from automatic to manual.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 11

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel cut a rug and freshen up Fat Stack’s interior to match the flashy exterior.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 12

Video.summary: The finish line is in sight for Fat Stack with finishing touches and a one-of-a-kind grille.
Video.title: Project Fat Stack – Part 13

Video.summary: Our 1971 Chevy Caprice, Project Fat Stack, ROARS to life after almost a year of work.
Video.title: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Image.alt: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew pick up a late model Cadillac and prep it for some serious speed.
Video.title: Fancy and Fast

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Our GM long block gets a big blower and a versatile EFI setup.
Video.title: Supercharged Stroker LS3

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: You blue oval fans might find a new favorite with our supercharged Ford Mustang bullet.
Video.title: Mustang Fastback

Video.summary: Monster horsepower, chassis mods, and plenty of performance goodies will take this land yacht to a new level!
Video.title: Grand Marquis Highwayman

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy wrap up their Cadillac CTSV Build with a few final details.
Video.title: Cadillac CTSV- Hammer it Home

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: Morphing a Firebird into a Trans Am
Video.title: Trans Am Transformation

Video.summary: Building a 500 horse pump gas Pontiac
Video.title: Trans Am Part 2

Video.summary: Upgrading F-body Poncho suspension & brakes
Video.title: Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic

Image.alt: Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic
Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic
Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic

Video.summary: How to build a posi-traction rear end
Video.title: Stout Differential

Video.summary: Modifying Rear Suspension and Frame for Big Power
Video.title: Tough As Nails Trans Am

Video.summary: How-to restore cracked fiberglass body panels, customize fender scoops and remove decals without paint damage.
Video.title: Bandit Body Building

Video.summary: Guest builder Chris Ryan coats our Tribute Trans Am with ebony paint.
Video.title: Beautiful Black Bird

Video.summary: How-to soundproof and refurbish a worn-out interior. Plus the guys show how to make a shaker hood.
Video.title: Interior Creature Comforts

Video.summary: Big inch Pontiac TA gets tuned on the chassis dyno and how to dial in your alignment without going to a shop.
Video.title: Firebird Finale

Video.summary: With a nod to the Grand National we’re giving our Buick Regal more Go Go.
Video.title: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
